'''Defender Droids''' were [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] made by [[Tendrando Arms]] and based on a modified [[YVH 1]] design.
[[DD-11A]] was one of these.

{{Droid-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''
*''[[Fate of the Jedi: Outcast]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Outcast (audiobook)}}
